causal_summary: [Mock Insight Mode Enabled] Causal Inference Summary: historical revenue growth ($963,809 projected over 90 days) is concentrated in Google Ads, which accounts for 85.7% of forecast channel revenue at 5.66x ROAS - see the Explainability tab for the full SHAP-ranked channel and campaign contributions. Blended ROAS (5.41x) is most sensitive to Meta Ads, which carries the widest 90-day ROAS forecast interval of the active channels (448% of its own P50 value) - a swing there moves the blended number the most.
